glosses.ja: メダル; ペンダント

translations.vi: Anh ấy đã giành được một huy chương.
translations.ja: 彼はメダルを獲得した。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person masculine singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (présent de l’indicatif, 3sg) used to form the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle functioning as the main lexical verb in the compound tense (passé composé).
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb phrase.

sentences.target: J’ai perdu ma médaille au parc.

translations.fr: J’ai perdu ma médaille au parc.
translations.en: I lost my medal at the park.
translations.es: Perdí mi medalla en el parque.
translations.de: Ich habe meine Medaille im Park verloren.
translations.it: Ho perso la mia medaglia al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公园丢了我的奖牌。
translations.yue: 我喺公園唔見咗我嘅獎牌。
translations.ru: Я потерял свою медаль в парке.
translations.vi: Tôi làm mất huy chương của mình ở công viên.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn medaille in het park kwijtgeraakt.
translations.uk: Я загубив свою медаль у парку.
translations.hi: मैंने पार्क में अपना पदक खो दिया.
translations.el: Έχασα το μετάλλιό μου στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Jeg mistet medaljen min i parken.
translations.id: Saya kehilangan medali saya di taman.
translations.sv: Jag tappade bort min medalj i parken.
translations.cs: Ztratil jsem svou medaili v parku.
translations.da: Jeg mistede min medalje i parken.
translations.ja: 公園でメダルをなくしました。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular clitic subject pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Auxiliary verb (présent de l’indicatif, 1sg) forming the passé composé with “perdu.”
Past participle serving as the main lexical verb within the compound tense.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying “médaille.”
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of “perdu.”
Contraction of the preposition “à” and the definite article “le”; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition “au,” marking location.

sentences.target: Ta médaille d’or brille vraiment fort.

translations.fr: Ta médaille d’or brille vraiment fort.
translations.en: Your gold medal shines really bright.
translations.es: Tu medalla de oro brilla mucho.
translations.it: La tua medaglia d’oro brilla molto.
translations.ru: Твоя золотая медаль очень ярко блестит.
translations.pt: Sua medalha de ouro brilha mucho.
translations.vi: Huy chương vàng của bạn rất sáng.
translations.uk: Твоя золота медаль дуже яскраво сяє.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा स्वर्ण पदक बहुत चमक रहा है.
translations.pl: Twój złoty medal bardzo mocno błyszczy.
translations.el: Το χρυσό σου μετάλλιο λάμπει πολύ.
translations.ro: Medalia ta de aur strălucește foarte tare.
translations.cs: Tvoje zlatá medaile se hodně leskne.
translations.ja: あなたの金メダルはとても輝いている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying “médaille.”
Head noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb “brille.”
Preposition “de” elided before a vowel; introduces the noun complement “or” (material/type).
Common noun functioning as a complement of “d’,” specifying the medal’s material/type.
Main intransitive verb (présent de l’indicatif, 3sg) with “médaille” as the subject.
Adverb of degree intensifying the manner of shining (reinforces “fort”/the verb phrase).
Adverb of manner meaning “strongly,” modifying “brille.”

sentences.target: Le chien porte une médaille avec mon numéro.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃjɛ̃ pɔʁt yn medaj avɛk mɔ̃ nymeʁo/

translations.fr: Le chien porte une médaille avec mon numéro.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃjɛ̃ pɔʁt yn medaj avɛk mɔ̃ nymeʁo/
translations.en: The dog is wearing a tag with my number.
translations.es: El perro lleva una placa con mi número.
translations.de: Der Hund trägt eine Marke mit meiner Nummer.
translations.it: Il cane porta una targhetta con il mio numero.
translations.ko: 개가 내 번호가 적힌 목걸이표를 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 狗戴着写有我号码的吊牌。
translations.yue: 隻狗戴住有我電話號碼嘅牌。
translations.ru: Собака носит жетон с моим номером.
translations.pt: O cachorro usa uma plaquinha com o meu número.
translations.he: הכלב עונד תג עם המספר שלי.
translations.tr: Köpek numaramın yazılı olduğu bir künye takıyor.
translations.vi: Con chó đeo thẻ có số của tôi.
translations.nl: De hond draagt een penning met mijn nummer.
translations.uk: Собака носить жетон з моїм номером.
translations.hu: A kutya bilétát visel a számommal.
translations.hi: कुत्ते के गले में मेरा नंबर वाला टैग है.
translations.pl: Pies nosi zawieszkę z moim numerem.
translations.el: Ο σκύλος φοράει καρτελάκι με τον αριθμό μου.
translations.nb: Hunden har et merke med nummeret mitt.
translations.id: Anjing memakai kalung nama dengan nomor saya.
translations.sv: Hunden bär en bricka med mitt nummer.
translations.ro: Câinele poartă o plăcuță cu numărul meu.
translations.cs: Pes má známku s mým číslem.
translations.da: Hunden har et mærke mit mit nummer.
translations.fi: Koira käyttää nimilaattaa, jossa on numeroni.
translations.ja: 犬が私の番号が書かれた札をつけています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing “chien.”
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject of “porte.”
Main transitive verb (présent de l’indicatif, 3sg), taking “une médaille” as its direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of “porte.”
Preposition introducing an accompanying detail/comitative complement.
1st-person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying “numéro.”
Common noun; object of the preposition “avec,” specifying the detail on the medal.
